description: Regex patterns for security_audit.py. Severities: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO.

patterns.name: aws_access_key
patterns.remediation: Rotate the key in AWS IAM immediately, then remove from file and rewrite git history with git filter-repo.

patterns.name: aws_secret_key_assignment
patterns.remediation: Rotate the AWS secret in IAM immediately; move to env var or AWS Secrets Manager.

patterns.name: github_token_classic
patterns.remediation: Revoke at https://github.com/settings/tokens; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: github_fine_pat
patterns.remediation: Revoke at https://github.com/settings/tokens; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: openai_key
patterns.remediation: Revoke at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: anthropic_key
patterns.remediation: Revoke at https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: slack_token
patterns.remediation: Revoke in Slack admin; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: stripe_live_secret
patterns.remediation: Roll the key in Stripe Dashboard; remove from file; rewrite history.

patterns.name: private_key_header
patterns.remediation: Delete the key file; generate a new keypair; revoke the old public key everywhere it was trusted.

patterns.name: pan_india
patterns.remediation: Remove from file. If in git history, rewrite with git filter-repo --replace-text.

patterns.name: aadhaar_india
patterns.remediation: Remove from file immediately; rewrite git history. Aadhaar disclosure can trigger legal liability under Section 29 of the Aadhaar Act.

patterns.name: gstin_india
patterns.remediation: Remove from file; GSTIN is indirect PAN disclosure (characters 3-12).

patterns.name: ifsc_code
patterns.remediation: IFSC alone is low-risk but if paired with account number suggests bank details exposure. Review context.

patterns.name: jwt_token
patterns.remediation: Treat as a bearer credential; rotate if valid; verify the signing secret isn't in the same file.

patterns.name: generic_secret_assignment
patterns.remediation: Move the value to an environment variable or secret manager. Use a placeholder like YOUR_API_KEY in committed code.

patterns.name: india_mobile
patterns.remediation: Review context — may be user PII. Replace with a placeholder if this is real.
